ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the component */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component type */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the component */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was manufactured */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility information with other components */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the component */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the component */,
  "max_pressure" REAL /* Maximum pressure the component can handle */,
  "min_pressure" REAL /* Minimum pressure the component can handle */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range the component can operate in */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any certifications the component has */,
  "tube_size" TEXT /* Size of the tube */,
  "thread_type" TEXT /* Type of thread (e.g., JIC, NPT, BSP) */,
  "length_m" REAL /* Length of the component in meters */,
  "length_l" REAL /* Length of the component in liters */,
  "square_y" TEXT /* Square value of the component (e.g., 1/2, 9/16) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_tube_size FOREIGN KEY ("tube_size") REFERENCES tube_sizes ("size_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_thread_type FOREIGN KEY ("thread_type") REFERENCES thread_types ("thread_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, storage room) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the component */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the component */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level to maintain */,
  "max_stock_level" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level to maintain */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the component */,
  "selling_price" REAL /* Selling price of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the component type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thread_types" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thread type */,
  "thread_name" TEXT /* Name of the thread type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the thread type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tube_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tube size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the tube size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tube size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., warehouse manager, procurement team, engineer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
